
# Merge Site
Take the following projects and merge them into the current project. Main theme, header, footer, and other common elements are already same. So, only main body parts should be merged. Please keep the sub-project body parts under src/tools/ directory. For example, the PDF-Compressor body part should be under src/tools/pdf-compressor/ directory.

Put the sub-project in separate end point such as /pdf-compressor, /pdf-merger, and /json-formatter. Replace the end-point link in the Tools menu as well. For example, the PDF-Compressor link in the Tools menu should be changed to /pdf-compressor.

PDF-Compressor: D:\Brian\workspaces\github-allthatjava-one\pdf-compressor-ui
PDF-Merger: D:\Brian\workspaces\github-allthatjava-one\pdf-merger-ui
JSON-Formatter: D:\Brian\workspaces\github-allthatjava-one\json-formatter

Plus move RotatingCards source code(.css and .jsx) into the src/components/ directory and use it in the home page.
